zh: McDermott 中端产品线，价格亲民
使用 McDermott 技术全球制造
4 色彩色镶嵌工艺，外观出色
部分型号支持冲/跳杆接牙（Break/Jump Joint）
en: McDermott's mid-range line at accessible prices
4-color overlay inlay craftsmanship with great aesthetics
Select models feature Break/Jump joint configuration

suitable_for.zh: 预算 $300-500 的进阶玩家，想要品牌品质但不想花太多钱。适合作为第一根'正经'球杆。
suitable_for.en: Advancing players with a $300-500 budget who want brand quality without breaking the bank. Ideal as a first 'serious' cue.

review.zh: Star 系列是 McDermott 打入中端市场的利器。虽然不是美国本土制造（全球制造，McDermott 监控品质），但延续了 McDermott 的设计语言和品质标准。$270-515 的价位覆盖了大量'想要品牌杆但预算有限'的玩家群体。4 色镶嵌工艺在这个价位很少见，外观上不输 G-Series 入门款。缺点是标配前节只是普通枫木，想要更好性能需要另外加购 G-Core。但作为一根日常练习和打友谊赛的杆，Star 完全够用。
review.en: The Star series is McDermott's weapon for the mid-range market. While not made in the USA (globally manufactured under McDermott quality control), it maintains McDermott's design language and quality standards. The $270-515 price range covers a large market of players who want a branded cue on a budget. The 4-color overlay craftsmanship is rare at this price point, matching entry-level G-Series aesthetics. The downside is the stock maple shaft — G-Core upgrade costs extra. But for daily practice and casual competition, Star is more than capable.
